name: Pineapple Vegetarian Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and stir-fry the onion until golden brown.
2. Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
3. Add carrots and green beans; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
4. Add pineapple, rice, ketchup, and salt. Mix well and stir-fry for another 3 minutes.
5. Arrange cucumber slices around the serving platter.
6. Pour the fried rice into the center.
7. Garnish with chopped green onion and fresh cilantro leaves.
